commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=61118e7d3695cb87084a9055b42b4f5e2078de01)
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds rejection-reset handling for the channel progress draft gate and regression tests for timer and direct `noteWork()` startup failures.

PR surface: Source +6, Tests +38. Total +44 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection shows current main and `v2026.5.27` set `started = true` before `onStart` resolves and do not reset it on rejection; this review did not run tests because the task is read-only.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] The next step is contributor or maintainer rebase plus real behavior proof; automation should not repair this PR while external proof remains insufficient.

target.title: fix(channels): reset progress draft gate started flag when onStart rejects
target.author: sebtardif

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
